
---
title: "US_pop_pr1"
author: "Raahat"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---
```{r}
library(readxl)

setwd("C:/Users/maths/Desktop/raahat_230957216")

getwd()

list.files()

us_pop <- read_excel("US_Population.xlsx")

print(us_pop)

library(stats)

us_ts <- ts(us_pop[[1]], start = 1790, frequency = 0.1)

us_pop_million <- us_pop[[1]] / 1000000

us_ts <- ts(us_pop_million, start = 1790, frequency = 0.1)

plot(us_ts,
     main = "US Population Over Time",
     xlab = "Year",
     ylab = "Population (in Millions)",
     col = "blue",
     lwd = 2)

#The data shows a strong upward trend

#No seasonal component is present

#Minor irregular fluctuations

#Trend component dominates the series
```
